sections.paragraph: ἅπ. λεγόμ. 2Ki 19:29 for which, Isa 37:30, there is found שָׁחִיס that which grows spontaneously in the third year from the sowing (on this compare Strabo, xi. 4, § 3, p. 502, Casaub.); comp. סָפִיחַ. LXX. 2 Ki. αὐτόματα. Aqu. and Theod. in Isa. αὐτοφυῆ. See as to the etymology under שָׁחִיס .
